description_long: This house features a rustic brick exterior with a weathered, multi-gabled shingle roof and a prominent central chimney. The structure includes a partially open wooden balcony on one side and a covered porch with a tattered awning on the other, suggesting a utilitarian, aged urban dwelling. Windows are irregularly placed, with some boarded up, and there are visible barrels, crates, and a ladder leaning against the wall, adding to the sense of use and wear. The roof has dormer windows and the brickwork shows signs of patching and repair. The main entryway is sheltered by a wooden overhang, and the overall design is asymmetrical, with a mix of open and enclosed spaces. The house exudes a sense of historical, working-class character, likely fitting into an older urban neighborhood.
description: A weathered brick house with a shingled gable roof, open balcony, and covered porch, featuring irregular windows and rustic details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, two barrels, and the open balcony to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long row of windows, a ladder, barrels, and a tattered awning on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying boarded-up windows, the central chimney, and the full extent of the wooden balcony.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the wooden balcony, a single arched window, and barrels near the wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a wooden overhang, steps, and a covered porch, flanked by barrels and rustic details.
